headline: VERIFY EVERY LINK IN THE CHAIN
subheading: How quality teams prove supplier bona fides under FMD and shut out falsified medicines.
flux_prompt: Abstract editorial illustration of a secure pharmaceutical supply chain and supplier verification. A luminous network of interconnected nodes and clean linked pathways stretches across a deep navy field, each node a glowing teal and cyan checkpoint, with one node sealed by a softly glowing verification ring and a subtle shield motif signalling an authenticated, trusted supplier. Stylised sealed medicine cartons rendered as smooth geometric volumes flow along the connections, one carved with a faint abstract data-matrix pattern of tiny squares and an intact anti-tampering band, all suggested without any readable characters. Crisp magnified scanning rings of light pass over a node to imply checking credentials against a register, while delicate filaments branch off to mark broker and trader links being confirmed. A single subtle green accent marks the one verified, compliant pathway amid the cooler teal lattice. Polished reflective surfaces, fine depth of field, floating particles and clean precise shadows convey clinical-luxury precision, trust and rigorous control. Layered translucent planes and soft volumetric light create a premium, modern sense of order and security. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
